title: logfia × intermedia
intro: Logfia × intermedia, also known as the intermediate logfia or intermediate filago, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with a long history of use in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Logfia × intermedia, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, are commonly used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
